case_title: CERRONE KIMBERLIE L VS BLUE BILLY et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CERRONE KIMBERLIE L IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRAGMEN BILLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERRONE KIMBERLIE L HEARING SET FOR JAN-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CERT. RECEIPT TO BILLY BRAGMAN RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,574.16 FILED BY CERRONE KIMBERLIE L AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE BILLY BRAGMEN BILLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE BILLY BRAGMEN BILLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-14-1993, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-20-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
